blended.narrative: Eldora is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 10,337 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Strong winds with gusts to 50 mph may cause lift holds. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 8" over the past week. Current depth: 35".
